nasb.text: When Uriah came to him, David asked concerning the welfare of Joab and the people and the state of the war.

esv.text: When Uriah came to him, David asked how Joab was doing and how the people were doing and how the war was going.

cnv.text: 烏利亞來到大衛那裡，大衛就問約押和士兵可好，又問戰場上的情形怎樣。

ccb.text: 乌利亚来了，大卫问他有关约押、士兵和战争的情况，
